transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-06-27]
[00:00] You: Let's run our sprint retrospective. What went well?
[00:30] Speaker 1: The new deployment pipeline was a huge win. We cut deployment time from 45 minutes to 8 minutes.
[01:00] Speaker 2: Communication was better this sprint. We actually used the daily standups effectively.
[01:30] You: What didn't go well?
[01:45] Speaker 1: We had three production incidents caused by missing database migrations. I'll create a migration checklist and add it to our deployment runbook by June 30th.
[02:30] Speaker 2: Our PR review cycle is still too slow. I'll set up auto-assignment for PR reviewers using a round-robin algorithm. I'll have that configured by July 1st.
[03:00] You: Great. I'll schedule a blameless post-mortem for the three incidents. I'll send calendar invites by end of day.
[03:30] Speaker 1: We should also add regression tests for the migration path. I'll draft a testing strategy doc by next Friday, July 4th.
[04:00] You: We've agreed to adopt a zero-defect policy starting next sprint.

action_items.description: Create database migration checklist and add to deployment runbook
action_items.source_quote: I'll create a migration checklist and add it to our deployment runbook by June 30th.

action_items.description: Configure auto-assignment for PR reviewers using round-robin algorithm
action_items.source_quote: I'll set up auto-assignment for PR reviewers using a round-robin algorithm. I'll have that configured by July 1st.

action_items.description: Schedule blameless post-mortem for three production incidents and send calendar invites
action_items.source_quote: I'll schedule a blameless post-mortem for the three incidents. I'll send calendar invites by end of day.

action_items.description: Draft regression testing strategy document for migration path
action_items.source_quote: I'll draft a testing strategy doc by next Friday, July 4th.

decisions: Adopt a zero-defect policy starting next sprint
